question: Under more ______ circumstances, the CEO would have approved the pay increases, but this year it was not possible.
BMC publishing company will be checking the article ______ mistakes and edit it before printing.
Although the ______ for the best design will be very fierce, Mr. Gozalas has a good chance of getting the award.
Many people are waiting outside for the box office to open so they can ______ tickets for the famous singer’s concert.
Thanks to the advances in technology, the state-of-the-art device is made ______ out of plastic.
Because there were too many participants at the seminar, we should ______ into smaller groups for discussion.
ABC Shoe Store asked ______ to make their final selections and bring them to cashiers’ stations within 30 minutes.
One of the leading companies, Big Star agreed to buy ______ Get-Well drug company for 10 billion dollars.
______ in computer technology have allowed technicians to perform multi-dimensional graphics far better than ever before.
Mr. Fukui ______ washes his hands with anti-bacterial detergent right after coming home.
Windpower Co. is faced with financial hardship, so in order to overcome this crisis, ______ financial support is needed.
The FM convenience store in the central park is ______ located and it is always busy with many customers.
Mr. Tallent handled all of the customers’ inquiries by ______ because the other sales representatives were out of the office.
As of October 1, Carla Fishermen will ______ the company as its interface in all dealings with the local government.
Ms. Harris was extremely ______ to take an opportunity to thank you for all of the hard-working and dedication.
______ we hire more factory workers, we cannot meet the deadline for the products on time.
The managers selected three attorneys to help with future contract ______.
Please accept our ______ apology for the mistakes that we made on the last project.
Any errors in your paycheck should be reported to the payroll department ______ so corrections can be made in a timely manner.
Please ______ Mr. Draper’s assistant of your arrival as soon as you get to his office tomorrow.
An investment ______ gradually increases in value over the years can be more profitable than more short-term alternatives.
New department heads must attend meetings ______ in order to be exposed to new ideas from other team members.
Several ______ errors with the new software delayed the release date by two months.
Our aim is to focus on customers’ needs and satisfaction by ______ introducing exceptional goods.
Students can ______ in the university’s education program starting July 6th.
Our firm received ______ from numerous clients for our excellent work over the past twenty years.
Beginning next April, financial benefits will be available ______ to those customers who signed the necessary contract.
Hyssop Chemists is ______ experienced pharmacists for the eight new locations they have opened this year.
______ the concert finished late, the audience still waited for me.
If you wish to make the trip to Auckland ______ the other department heads, please let Ms. Berlin know immediately.
Maurice Robertson, ______ an executive at a small company, became the CEO of Bradshaw Industries four months ago.
While we still take telephone calls, other ______ of correspondence are encouraged to avoid tying up telephone lines unnecessarily.
Finding qualified students for this job may be ______ difficult.
Ms. Julie Kennedy and her innovative marketing team have gained renown for creating ______ products for struggling companies.
New customer service personnel are trained to ______ to inquiries within a reasonable amount of time.
For the researcher, a properly maintained notebook can be a ______ of useful information for many years.
Alvinson Clothiers’ branch in Milan has been open since last August ______ is quickly becoming our busiest location.
There will be a panel ______ of pharmaceutical company spokesperson and consumer advocates to debate current health concerns.
Please omit ______ details when you are reporting the findings revealed at the symposium.
______ working with the research department some of the time, the marketing team comes up with fresh ideas for the company’s new ads.
